creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Mon May 12 13:45:47 2014
New Revision: 353819
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353819
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353819/

Log:
  - Update to 13.0 RC1
  - Remove useless dvdread run  depends
  
  PR:		ports/189108
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile
  head/multimedia/xbmc/distinfo
  head/multimedia/xbmc/pkg-plist

Modified: head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile	Mon May 12 13:40:58 2014	(r353818)
+++ head/multimedia/xbmc/Makefile	Mon May 12 13:45:47 2014	(r353819)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	xbmc
-DISTVERSION=	13.0.beta1
-PORTREVISION=	2
+DISTVERSION=	13.0.rc1
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 
 MAINTAINER=	mickael.maillot@gmail.com
@@ -17,7 +16,6 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	enca:${PORTSDIR}/converte
 		zip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/zip \
 		unzip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip \
 		nasm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/nasm \
-		dvdread-config:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/libdvdread \
 		gtk-update-icon-cache:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk20 \
 		swig2.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig20
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libass.so:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/libass \
@@ -54,8 +52,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqli
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	xbmc
-GH_COMMIT=	128426f
-GH_TAGNAME=	Gotham-beta1
+GH_COMMIT=	2372235
+GH_TAGNAME=	Gotham_rc1
 
 USES=		gmake iconv:wchar_t pkgconfig
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf libtool automake libltdl
